theoremName: finite augmented Xi/KLM pullback identity theorem

hardyBranchIdentityStatus.label: finite shifted-Xi Hardy branch identity
hardyBranchIdentityStatus.reason: The hardened canonical Hardy theorem gives the signed Hardy branch Gram for every finite Xi_N by applying the same identity to E_{omega,N}(z)=Xi_N(z+i omega).

mellinVolterraSplitStatus.label: finite atom Mellin-to-Volterra split
mellinVolterraSplitStatus.reason: The symbolic Mellin theorem splits every retained atom into a diagonal Volterra/KLM tail and the primitive Mu boundary trace.

finiteAugmentedPullbackStatus.label: finite augmented pullback identity
finiteAugmentedPullbackStatus.reason: Summing the atomwise tail identities gives T_N^*KLM_NT_N; summing the primitive prefixes gives the augmented trace repair R_aug,N^*D_aug,N R_aug,N.

proof: Apply the canonical Hardy identity to E_{omega,N}.
Expand Xi_N into finitely many Mellin atoms.
Apply the symbolic moving-boundary split to each atom.
Collect diagonal Volterra tails into T_N^*KLM_NT_N.
Collect primitive prefixes into the augmented trace repair.
